title: Corpay Inc. (FLT) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value estimate for Corpay Inc. (FLT) using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model based on the latest free cash flow (1.299145e+09) and price (284.3800048828125).

revenueGrowth.rationale: Corpay consistently demonstrates high-single to low-double-digit growth through a combination of robust organic corporate payments adoption and its programmatic M&A strategy.

terminalGrowthRate.rationale: The B2B payments market has immense runway for digitization. The assumption reflects a strong, durable shift away from manual AP processes and checks globally.

discountRate.rationale: Incorporates slightly higher cyclical risk tied to fuel volume dependency and macroeconomic sensitivity among small-to-medium enterprise (SME) clients.
